name: Beadrow
description: Beads sliding along a strung thread, each bead re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 48%; width: 100%; height: 5%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: @pick(18%, 44%, 70%); top: 50%; @size: 30%; margin: -15% 0 0 0; border-radius: 50%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
